creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Thank you for taking the time to report this issue, and I'm sorry that there has been no response until now.

FreeBSD 9.x is no longer supported, and GCC 4.2.1 that was responsible for this issue is no longer used as the compiler for supported releases; we switched to Clang as of 10.0, so this issue now does not apply.
